creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Michael,

I see that you already took the other related ports, so feel free to grab this
one from me as well and commit the changes.

Cheers,
Frederic

>    These all have to be done at once to keep the dependencies from being
>    borked.  Culot: Can you take the rest?
> 
>     
> 
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163131
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163677
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163676
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163678
>    port  devel/ruby-thrift must be  moved to devel/rubygem-thrift because it
>    a rubygem package and now install from rubygem repository
>    3 ports, thrift, php5-thrift, py-thrift v0.8.0 i use in production about 1
>    week (on one coredump or error) :)
> 
>     
> 
>     
> 
>
